description_long: This is a modern double bed with a whitewashed wooden frame, featuring a rectangular headboard and footboard with horizontal slats. The bed is neatly made with a light-colored fitted sheet and a matching comforter, both accented by a subtle yellow-beige border. Four pillows are arranged at the head of the bed, two of which have a decorative green leaf pattern, adding a touch of color and nature-inspired design. The frame sits low to the ground, giving it a contemporary platform style. The overall appearance is clean, minimalistic, and inviting, suitable for a bedroom in an urban apartment or home. The materials and finish suggest durability and a soft, comfortable sleeping surface.
description: A modern whitewashed wooden platform bed with a slatted headboard, light bedding, and decorative leaf-patterned pillows. The design is minimalistic and inviting, with a soft, comfortable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted headboard, four pillows (two with green leaf patterns), and the neatly made bedding with a yellow-beige border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's low platform frame, the thickness of the mattress, and the arrangement of pillows against the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the footboard's solid panel design and the overall rectangular shape of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same platform frame and bedding, with a clear view of the decorative pillows and headboard.
